race.comment: Competitive. BODY OF VENUS (5) returned from a spell with a strong win in a 56 over 1100m at Horsham. He'd switched from the McEvoy stable and has been off the scene for 261 days. Is sure to have taken improvement and is proven second-up. Has John Allen aboard today and can go back-to-back. BURLEIGH (8) won his Maiden easily over 1206m at Terang as expected and then went back and was beaten 1.4L in a 56 over the same distance. Has the rail today and carries 3kg less. Coffey rides for the first time, and he's a decent chance to bounce. JUST BOLTS (3) peaks off a long neck defeat over 1000m at Yarra Valley, this level. Keeps improving and will position forward. MARTY MCFLY (2) caught the eye late last start and should be strong again.
